title: Constant crashes
snippet: App crashes every time I try to download offline music. Premium for what?

title: Bring back the old UI
snippet: The new home screen is impossible to navigate. I just want my playlists.

title: Discover Weekly is magic
snippet: Every Monday I find 3-4 new favorites. Worth the subscription alone.

title: Cancelled my subscription
snippet: Trial ended and the upsell flow felt pretty pushy — ended up uninstalling.

title: Good but expensive
snippet: Family plan is great but Apple Music is half the price now.

title: Trial-to-paid was confusing
snippet: Wasn't clear what happens to my downloads when the trial ends. Took me a while to figure out.

title: Great catalog, bad search
snippet: Can never find specific live versions. Search is broken for niche queries.

title: Login keeps logging out
snippet: I have to sign in every other day. There's no two-factor or anything.

title: Best music app
snippet: Been using it 8 years. Daily Mix and Wrapped are the best features anywhere.

title: Audiobooks ruined the app
snippet: I came here for music. Now half the screen is podcasts and audiobooks I don't want.

title: Lossless when?
snippet: Apple, Tidal, Amazon all have HiFi. Still waiting on Spotify after years of promises.

title: Trial flow needs a reminder
snippet: Subscription kicked in right after my trial — wish there was a clearer heads-up before that.
